name: Spider Ambush
description: A massive spider drops from the webbed ceiling, its offspring chittering nearby!
ambient_description: Thick webs cover the walls and ceiling. A massive spider suddenly drops down, its fangs dripping venom. Three smaller spiders skitter from the shadows!
victory_description: The giant spider collapses with a final shudder. Its offspring scatter into the darkness, leaving behind valuable spider silk and venom glands.
defeat_description: Webbing entangles you as venomous fangs strike. You barely escape the spider's lair, poisoned and wounded.
